mapper.insert: insert into hotel_high_voucher (name, scope_type, scope_id, coupon_type, channel_type, total_stock, available_stock, pay_value, actual_value, begin_time, end_time, seckill_begin_time, seckill_end_time, per_limit, day_limit, status, rules, remark, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{couponType}, #{channelType}, #{totalStock}, #{availableStock}, #{payValue}, #{actualValue}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{seckillBeginTime}, #{seckillEndTime}, #{perLimit}, #{dayLimit}, #{status}, #{rules}, #{remark}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update hotel_high_voucher set available_stock = available_stock - 1 where id = #{id} and available_stock > 0
